title: Angostura cuneifolia

The classification of Angostura cuneifolia is further defined by its specific epithet cuneifolia, indicating its leaf shape, which is cuneate or wedge-shaped. The plant's classification is within the order Gentianales and its kingdom is Plantae. This classification helps to categorize the plant and understand its relationships with other species within the Rubiaceae family.
